checklistName: Private Local Japanese Text Display Cleanup Checklist
operationPolicy: Private Local first; Japanese display cleanup is limited to visible text review after PR #235 main pull.
cleanupPolicy: Only clear visible mojibake or unnatural labels are cleaned up; unclear text remains pending.
textScopePolicy: Display labels and descriptions may change; ids, links, anchors, file paths, script references, DB structure, builder structure, and tests remain stable.
pendingPolicy: Text whose meaning cannot be inferred safely is recorded as pending and is not rewritten.
securitySoftwarePolicy: Norton and security-software friendly operation; no hidden updater, auto-run launcher, suspicious background execution, or dangerous launcher extension changes.
prMergePolicy: No direct commit to main; feature branch and Draft PR are required; merge only after user confirmation.
